title: clerodendrum formicarum
intro: Clerodendrum formicarum, also known as the Ant Plant or Ant Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and is known for its unique relationship with ants, which live in its hollow stems and help protect it from herbivores. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving pain. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Clerodendrum formicarum are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
